personality.voice: Confident, warm, and quietly intelligent — like a seasoned property manager who always has the answer before you ask the question
personality.design_philosophy: AI as invisible infrastructure — every workflow is AI-assisted by default, but the interface feels calm, intuitive, and human. No 'AI-powered' badges. The intelligence is felt, not labeled.
personality.emotional_target: Users should feel like they have a brilliant partner handling the complexity, freeing them to focus on growing their portfolio
personality.target_audience: Independent landlords and small-to-mid property management companies (25–200 units) who are tech-savvy but overwhelmed by manual processes
personality.competitive_position: AI-native property management — not a legacy platform with AI bolted on, but built from the ground up with predictive insights, proactive alerts, and automated workflows at the core

feature_specs.name: AI Adaptive Dashboard
feature_specs.description: Dashboard that automatically reorganizes widgets, metrics, and insights based on user role (landlord, tenant, developer) and behavior patterns. Surfaces what matters most without manual configuration.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Card-based grid layout with drag-to-reorder. AI silently tracks interaction frequency and reorders cards. Role detection on first login sets initial layout. Skeleton loading animations during data fetch. Metric cards animate on data update.

feature_specs.name: Command Palette
feature_specs.description: Global Cmd+K / Ctrl+K quick-access panel for searching properties, tenants, actions, and navigating anywhere in the app instantly.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Modal overlay with search input, categorized results list, keyboard navigation, recent actions history. Slide-down entrance animation. Fuzzy search across all entities.

feature_specs.name: AI Rent Optimization
feature_specs.description: Predictive rent pricing engine that analyzes market comparables, vacancy risk, seasonal trends, and property condition to recommend optimal rent prices.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Inline widget on property detail and landlord portal. Shows current vs recommended rent with confidence score. Sparkline chart showing market trend. No 'AI-powered' badge — the intelligence is self-evident from the data presented.

feature_specs.name: Smart Maintenance Triage
feature_specs.description: AI auto-classifies maintenance requests by urgency (emergency, urgent, routine), suggests appropriate vendors, and estimates repair costs from description and photos.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Progressive form with natural language description field. AI classification appears as colored urgency badge after submission. Vendor suggestions appear as cards with ratings. Cost estimate shown as a range bar. All AI outputs feel like native UI, not chatbot responses.

feature_specs.name: Predictive Vacancy Alerts
feature_specs.description: AI analyzes lease expiration dates, tenant behavior signals, market conditions, and historical patterns to predict vacancy risk and recommend proactive retention strategies.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Dashboard alert cards with risk level (low/medium/high) color coding. Timeline visualization showing upcoming expirations. AI recommendations slide in as contextual suggestions near each at-risk property. Progressive disclosure — summary first, details on click.

feature_specs.name: AI Tenant Screening
feature_specs.description: Comprehensive applicant evaluation combining credit, background, income verification, and rental history into a single AI-generated screening score with explanations.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Application pipeline board (Kanban-style). Each applicant card shows AI score as a circular gauge. Click to expand detailed breakdown. Side-by-side comparison mode for multiple applicants. Score factors shown as horizontal bar chart. Compliance disclaimers shown inline, not as modal interruptions.

feature_specs.name: Smart Scheduling & Booking
feature_specs.description: AI-optimized property showing scheduler that considers travel time between properties, applicant preferences, and landlord availability to suggest optimal time slots.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Calendar widget with AI-suggested slots highlighted. Drag-to-schedule interaction. Confirmation flow as a lightweight modal. Google Maps integration showing route optimization between showings. Micro-animation on booking confirmation.

feature_specs.name: Automated Payment Collection
feature_specs.description: Multi-method rent collection (ACH, card, digital wallets) with automated reminders, late fee calculation, receipt generation, and payout management.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Payment dashboard with status cards (collected, pending, overdue) using color-coded badges. Reminder configuration as a settings panel with preview. Payment history as a filterable table with export. Progress bars for monthly collection goals.

feature_specs.name: Digital Lease Management
feature_specs.description: End-to-end lease lifecycle from template-based creation through e-signatures to renewal management, with AI suggesting optimal lease terms based on market data.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Multi-step wizard for lease creation with progressive disclosure. Document preview panel. E-signature flow embedded inline. Renewal alerts as dashboard cards. AI term suggestions appear as subtle inline hints near relevant fields, not as separate panels.

feature_specs.name: Role-Based Portal System
feature_specs.description: Distinct portal experiences for tenants, landlords, and developers — each with tailored navigation, features, and AI insights relevant to their role.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Shared adaptive sidebar layout with role-specific navigation items, color-coded section headers, and contextual AI widgets. Portal switcher for users with multiple roles. Consistent component library ensures visual cohesion across portals while content differs.

feature_specs.name: AI Property Insights
feature_specs.description: Contextual intelligence layer that surfaces relevant insights (market trends, comparable properties, neighborhood data, investment metrics) wherever property data is displayed.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Inline insight cards that appear contextually — on property detail pages, in the dashboard, during lease creation. Expandable with progressive disclosure. Data visualizations use consistent chart components. Insights feel like native content, not a bolted-on feature.

feature_specs.name: Dark Mode
feature_specs.description: System-aware dark theme with polished implementation across all pages and components.
feature_specs.ui_approach: CSS custom properties for all colors. Automatic detection of system preference with manual toggle in settings. Smooth transition animation between modes. Dark surfaces use subtle elevation differentiation rather than borders. Charts and visualizations adapt color palettes.

feature_specs.name: Progressive Onboarding
feature_specs.description: Multi-step post-registration flow that collects role-specific information, imports existing properties, and personalizes the dashboard — with the option to skip and configure later.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Full-screen centered card with step progress bar. Role selection as large clickable cards with illustrations. Property import as a drag-and-drop zone or manual form. Completion celebration with confetti micro-animation. Each step validates before advancing.

feature_specs.name: Natural Language Search
feature_specs.description: Search properties, tenants, and documents using natural language queries like 'vacant 2-bedrooms under $2000 near downtown'.
feature_specs.ui_approach: Prominent search bar with typeahead suggestions. Query is parsed into visible filter chips that users can modify. Results update with animated transitions. Available in both the property listing page and command palette.

display.usage: Headlines, hero text, page titles, feature section headers

body.usage: Body copy, UI labels, buttons, form fields, navigation

mono.usage: Code snippets, API references, financial figures, property IDs

buttons.primary: bg-accent text-white font-body font-semibold rounded-lg px-6 py-3 hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-200
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border-2 border-primary text-primary font-body font-semibold rounded-lg px-6 py-3 hover:bg-primary hover:text-white transition-all duration-200
buttons.ghost: bg-transparent text-secondary font-body font-medium px-4 py-2 hover:bg-background rounded-md transition-all duration-200

cards.default: bg-surface rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-border p-6 hover:shadow-card_hover transition-shadow duration-300
cards.metric: bg-surface rounded-xl shadow-sm border border-border p-5 with-count-up-animation
cards.property: bg-surface rounded-xl shadow-md overflow-hidden hover:shadow-lg transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-1

forms.input: w-full border border-border rounded-lg px-4 py-3 font-body text-text_primary bg-surface focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:border-transparent transition-all duration-200
forms.label: font-body font-medium text-text_primary text-sm mb-1.5 block

navigation.sidebar: adaptive collapsible, role-based sections, icon + label, active state with accent left border
navigation.topbar: logo left, nav center, auth/profile right, command palette shortcut hint
navigation.command_palette: modal overlay, search input, categorized results, keyboard nav, recent history

landing_pages.style: Long-form with alternating sections, lead capture focus

accessibility.color_contrast: WCAG AA minimum (4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text)
accessibility.focus_indicators: Visible focus ring using accent color on all interactive elements
accessibility.aria_labels: All interactive elements and dynamic content regions
accessibility.keyboard_navigation: Full keyboard support including command palette
accessibility.screen_reader: Semantic HTML, ARIA landmarks, live regions for dynamic updates
